headline: The Real Engine Behind ServiceNow Stock Is Its Contract Backlog
summary: With the stock beaten down by fears of AI disruption, one number reveals a surprising foundation of long-term customer commitment that the market seems to be overlooking.

headline: Datadog CEO Olivier Pomel Sells 127,000 Shares for $32.9 Million
summary: Pomel exercised vested stock options under a pre-established trading plan, reducing direct holdings by 17% while maintaining ~9 million derivative securities.

headline: Datadog: Fantastic Execution, Stretched Valuation
summary: Datadog Q1 2026 tops $1B in revenue with 32% YoY growth, but 25x P/S leaves little margin of safety. Click here to read this latest analysis of DDOG stock.
